final:
module HMAC (  
    input [7:0] key,  
    input [7:0] message,  
    output reg [7:0] hmac  
);  
    always @(key, message) begin  
        hmac = key ^ message; // Simple XOR operation for HMAC  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      hmac = ~key & ~message;
    end
  end

endmodule
